title: Muscarella exesilabia
taxonomy: Muscarella exesilabia is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Muscarella, which is a group of orchids native to Central and South America. The family Orchidaceae is one of the largest and most diverse plant families, consisting of over 30,000 species. Muscarella exesilabia is further classified as a member of the subfamily Epidendroideae, which includes many epiphytic orchids. At the most basic taxonomic level, Muscarella exesilabia is also a member of the kingdom Plantae.
